title: pai-sdk prompt config
description: A prompt definition: model + params + output schema + message templates with {variable} slots. Simple form: top-level system/user. General form: a messages list.

name.description: Prompt name (identifies it in logs and traces).

model.description: provider/model-id string, e.g. 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5'. Optional — can be supplied at call time instead.

params.description: generate_text keyword arguments applied on every call (per-call overrides win).

output.description: Structured output: either field-type shorthand ({field: string|number|integer|boolean|'<type>[]'|[enum,...]|nested mapping}) or a full JSON Schema via {schema: {...}}.

schema.description: Full JSON Schema for the output object.

system.description: Simple form: the system prompt template. Optimizable by default (it IS the instructions). Mutually exclusive with messages:.

user.description: Simple form: the user message template. Never optimized. Mutually exclusive with messages:.

messages.description: General form: explicit message list (multiple system blocks, few-shot assistant turns, per-message optimize/id). Mutually exclusive with top-level system/user.

templateString.description: Text with {variable} placeholders. Plain {name} only; escape literal braces as {{ and }}.

content.description: Literal text — no interpolation, braces left alone.

optimize.description: Whether a reflective optimizer (e.g. GEPA) may rewrite this text. Template mutations must preserve the {variable} set.

id.description: Stable id for addressing this message (e.g. with_template).

outputFieldType.description: string | number | integer | boolean (null means string), '<type>[]' for arrays, a list of literals for an enum, or a nested mapping for a nested object.
